pi_items.metadata_value: RESTRICTED SYSTEM: Authorized agency staff only.
pi_items.verified_value: RESTRICTED SYSTEM: Authorized agency staff only.
pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly require this exact string.
Confirmed via environment setup script (install_socioboard.sh) which clones the Socioboard repository to /opt/socioboard and installs the PHP application there.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real open-source Socioboard 4.0 installation cloned from GitHub, confirming it is non-synthetic. The codebase path is verified as '/opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/' through the environment installation scripts. The expected security banner text 'RESTRICTED SYSTEM: Authorized agency staff only.' is explicitly required by the task instructions and enforced in the verifier logic.
